title: Is there a way to move a board from a folder to another folder upon a time trigger?

posts.author: Lustig (Liran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I want to create 2 folders of boards. The first board of tours that will happen, and the next one for tours of the past.
Can I set a trigger for moving boards from a folder to another, in the same way an item moves between 2 groups, upon a past-date trigger ?

Thank you for your help

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Liran!

Unfortunately, it is not possible at this time to use automations to move boards between folders but this is a great suggestion!

We’d love for you to add it in the Community feature requests section here so our product team can take a look at developing it!

posts.author: RachaelRainbow (Rachael Rainbow)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve added ity as a feature request as it would be really useful for me too. If you still need this feature, please go and vote for it:

Add an automation that moves a board to another folder on status change Feature requests
We have a lot of boards (150+) so use folders to organise them. It would be really useful if we could move boards between folders using automations on status change, e.g. when status changes from ‘Proposal’ to ‘Live’ move the board from the ‘Proposals’ folder to the ‘Live jobs’ folder. At the moment we have to drag them manually. I see this has been raised previously:
